case_title: 1045 MISSION, LP VS. EVANGELOS SKEVOFILAX et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKEVOFILAX, EVANGELOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1045 MISSION STREET, APT. #206, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, LP AS TO DEFENDANT SKEVOFILAX, EVANGELOS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, LP
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SKEVOFILAX, EVANGELOS
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1045 MISSION, LP
